label: Generative modeling

node.label: Generative modeling
node.definition: A model learns a data distribution or transformation process capable of producing new samples.
node.why_it_matters: The role of Generative modeling is to connect Probability theory, Distributions, uncertainty & beliefs to downstream capabilities including Maximum likelihood & cross-entropy, Autoregressive / next-step prediction, Reconstruction objectives.
limitations: The chosen learning signal and interaction pattern may not match the deployment objective or data-generating process. Its direct dependencies include Probability theory, Distributions, uncertainty & beliefs.

dependencies.rationale: Generative modeling uses Probability theory as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Generative modeling uses Distributions, uncertainty & beliefs as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Generative modeling uses Latent variables & hidden state as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Generative modeling uses Optimization theory as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.

sentence_units.text: A model learns a data distribution or transformation process capable of producing new samples.

The role of Generative modeling is to connect Probability theory, Distributions, uncertainty & beliefs to downstream capabilities including Maximum likelihood & cross-entropy, Autoregressive / next-step prediction, Reconstruction objectives.

The chosen learning signal and interaction pattern may not match the deployment objective or data-generating process. Its direct dependencies include Probability theory, Distributions, uncertainty & beliefs.
Generative modeling uses Probability theory as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Generative modeling uses Distributions, uncertainty & beliefs as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Generative modeling uses Latent variables & hidden state as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Generative modeling uses Optimization theory as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
